description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a low stone wall and featuring a gated entry. The exterior is characterized by clean, geometric lines and a flat roof, with a mix of dark and light facade panels. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a small garden area with tall, slender trees, and a covered outdoor seating area. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is marked by a gate and a pathway leading to a recessed doorway, partially sheltered by an overhang. The overall design emphasizes minimalism and functionality, with a focus on outdoor integration.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, asymmetrical windows, and a gated yard featuring a driveway, garden, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main gate, driveway with a car, tall trees, and the prominent dark facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, and lighter facade panels, with a clear view of the garden and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with multiple windows and the open yard, emphasizing the building's rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden area, outdoor seating, and the dark facade with several windows and a secondary entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a recessed main door, overhang, and pathway, flanked by tall trees and minimal decorative elements
